Village that rezoned property for transit-oriented development
88-unit multi-family housing project with community artist workshops and galleries on its ground floor at the Development Site west of the MTA Property in Tarrytown, NY
Authorization to conditionally designate Hudson Harbor Station, LLC as successful proposer under RFP and negotiate Ground Lease for ±25,000 sq ft of MTA Property at 2 Depot Plaza, Tarrytown

tool_args.label: TOD RFP Response - Hudson Harbor Station, LLC

payload.description: Hudson Harbor was the only respondent to the RFP issued by MTA Transit Oriented Development for ground lease of Leased Premises and related improvements
Net present value of base rent for the initial term of the Ground Lease, discounted at 6%
Initial annual Base Rent for the Ground Lease

payload.raw_value_text: ± 25,000 square feet of the MTA Property

payload.raw_value_text: 37 parking spaces dedicated for tenant parking at the Project

tool_args.label: Proposed Annual Base Rent from Hudson Harbor

payload.raw_value_text: annual base rent for the Leased Premises of $36,000
payload.description: Annual base rent proposed by Hudson Harbor for the Leased Premises, subject to escalations
Base rent escalates by 15% every 5 years during the term of the Ground Lease
Base term of the Ground Lease

payload.raw_value_text: two 15-year renewal options (Years 50 – 64 and Years 65 – 79) for a total lease term of 79 years
payload.description: Maximum total lease term including two 15-year renewal options
Number of housing units in the proposed transit-oriented development project

payload.claim_text: Hudson Harbor was the only respondent to the RFP
payload.description: Only one proposer responded to the MTA TOD RFP for the ground lease of the Leased Premises

payload.claim_text: The net present value of the ground rent payable equals or exceeds the fair market value of the Leased Premises as determined by an independent appraisal obtained by TOD
payload.description: Independent appraisal confirms rent NPV meets or exceeds fair market value

payload.claim_text: MTA TOD and MNR view Hudson Harbor's proposal as an opportunity to facilitate transit-oriented development, obtain unfettered 24/7 use of the Access Drive, improve ADA accessibility to the Station, obtain at no expense improvements to the portion of the Parking Lot to be retained by MTA, and generate revenue for the MTA Capital Program
payload.description: Benefits of the Hudson Harbor proposal as described by MTA TOD and MNR

tool_args.label: Parking Lot Improvements - Repaving, Striping, Lighting

payload.description: Repaving, striping and lighting of the portion of the Parking Lot to be retained by MTA, and perpetual maintenance at Hudson Harbor's expense

payload.description: The TOD Project requires improvements to the MTA Parking Lot including repaving, striping, lighting and maintenance at Hudson Harbor's expense
The Project requires improved and expanded access easements providing MTA/MNR access to the MTA Property and Yard and the northbound platform of Tarrytown Station
The Project requires 37 dedicated tenant parking spaces on the Leased Premises
Board authorization for the Ground Lease and Transaction Documents is a key milestone for the TOD Project
Hudson Harbor responded to the TOD RFP as sole respondent
Hudson Harbor intends to develop the Project on the Development Site under the TOD Zoning
MTA is the agency for the Ground Lease and related property improvements
MTA Metro-North Railroad is a co-agency for the Ground Lease and related access improvements
